Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Reroute at 63rd/Stony Island
ShortDescription: #63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line Service Disruption
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are experiencing a service disruption at 95th to 87th due to police activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are experiencing a service disruption at 95th due to police activity.

Bus shuttles are also available to help make connections. Bus shuttles are available between 87th and 95th.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#29 State

#22 Clark

#24 Wentworth

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.
